description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a wood-textured frame and legs, and smooth, light-colored front panels. The front side displays two doors on either side and two central drawers, each with a small square handle, providing ample storage space. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and top have a consistent wood grain pattern, giving the piece a contemporary yet natural appearance. The legs are angled outward, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the cabinet is designed to be freestanding.
description: A modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with wood-textured frame, angled legs, and smooth light-colored front panels featuring two doors and two drawers.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain, light-colored panel with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: Rear/front view showing two doors and two central drawers with small square handles, as well as the wood-textured frame and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and depth.
